subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou beholdest the pure-hearted plunging into the seas of longing, drawn unto the Luminary of the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری المخلصین خائضین فی بحار الاشتیاق منجذبین الی نیر الافاق و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
